notes: Directionality checks: 94.7% of (regime, B, scenario) comparisons satisfy expected directional ordering (N=50,000, seed=42). Published in paper verification table.

Sensitivity analysis: robustness sweeps completed in paper across beta (+/-20%), sigma_sev (0.8-1.6), severe delay cap (48-96h), and demand CV (+/-30%). See Appendix of Paper 242 (Stress Conditioned Monte Carlo Modeling of Stockout Risk on the Savannah to Atlanta Lane).
Historical backtesting planned against known corridor disruption windows (Tropical Storm Debby Aug 2024, Hurricane Ian Sep 2022) pending lane-level replenishment outcome data.
GPA calibration requires direct operational data feed (throughput, dwell time, gate activity). Not yet connected.
Model and dashboard are pre-publication research prototypes. All outputs are illustrative estimates.
